topic: Every wedding photo on our wall shows a fifth person standing behind us
title: Every Wedding Photo on Our Wall Shows a Fifth Person Standing Behind Us. Our Wedding Had Four People. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Our wedding photos show five people. There were only four of us there.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed wedding photograph on a hallway wall showing the back of a couple in formal dress in a courthouse setting with a tall figure in a long dark coat partially visible behind them, dim ambient hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Courthouse ceremony. February two thousand twenty one. COVID winter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a small modest courthouse ceremony room with marble floors and wood paneling, winter daylight through tall windows, a small wooden lectern, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Me. My wife. The judge. One witness. That was it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of four empty white folding chairs arranged facing a wooden lectern in a courthouse room, soft natural light through a tall window, marble floor reflective, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We picked up the prints from the photographer three weeks later.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a stack of glossy 4 by 6 photographic prints fanned out on a kitchen table, the top print showing a courthouse wedding scene, a hand picking up the corner of one print, warm lamp light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Behind us in every photo. A man in a dark coat.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single 4 by 6 print held in two hands, the image showing the back of a couple at a courthouse with a tall man in a long dark wool coat standing behind them, his face turned away from the camera, dim warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same coat. Same posture. Different angle in every frame.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of multiple wedding prints overlapping on a wooden table, each showing the same tall dark coated figure in a slightly different position but the same posture, dim warm lamp light, no faces clearly visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We asked the photographer. He said only four people walked into his studio.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen resting on a desk showing an email conversation with a photography studio, the visible text in plain professional correspondence, dim ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We checked the digital files. Same man. Every single frame.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a grid of small wedding photo thumbnails, in each thumbnail the same tall dark coated figure visible in the background, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked the courthouse for the security footage. The hallway was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small CRT monitor showing grainy black and white security footage of an empty courthouse hallway, a visible timestamp in the corner, no figures present, scan lines across the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My mother saw the photos last Thanksgiving. She started crying.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a Thanksgiving dinner table with the photo prints spread on the corner of the tablecloth, a woman's hands held in front of her face seen from the side, warm pendant light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She said it was my grandfather. He died in nineteen ninety seven.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed black and white portrait photograph on a fireplace mantel showing an older man in formal dress and a long coat, the photo aged and slightly faded, soft afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never met him. He is in every photo I have taken since the wedding.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a phone photo gallery grid, a tall dark coated figure visible in the background or edge of each thumbnail, dim ambient living room light, vertical 9:16 framing
